con:part.con:content: <definitions name="consultarTabelaWS" targetNamespace="eproc" xmlns="http://schemas.xmlsoap.org/wsdl/" xmlns:soap="http://schemas.xmlsoap.org/wsdl/soap/" xmlns:SOAP-ENC="http://schemas.xmlsoap.org/soap/encoding/" xmlns:wsdl="http://schemas.xmlsoap.org/wsdl/" xmlns:xsd="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema" xmlns:tns="eproc"> <types> <xsd:schema elementFormDefault="qualified" targetNamespace="eproc"> <xsd:complexType name="Lista"> <xsd:sequence> <xsd:element minOccurs="0" maxOccurs="unbounded" name="item" type="xsd:string"/> </xsd:sequence> </xsd:complexType> <xsd:complexType name="Tabela"> <xsd:sequence> <xsd:element minOccurs="0" maxOccurs="unbounded" name="linha" type="tns:Lista"/> </xsd:sequence> </xsd:complexType> </xsd:schema> </types> <message name="consultarDadosRequest"> <part name="nomeTabela" type="xsd:string"/> </message> <message name="consultarDadosResponse"> <part name="tabela" type="tns:Tabela"/> </message> <message name="listarTabelasRequest"></message> <message name="listarTabelasResponse"> <part name="listaTabelas" type="tns:Lista"/> </message> <portType name="consultarTabelaPortType"> <operation name="consultarDados"> <input message="tns:consultarDadosRequest"/> <output message="tns:consultarDadosResponse"/> </operation> <operation name="listarEstrutura"> <input message="tns:consultarDadosRequest"/> <output message="tns:consultarDadosResponse"/> </operation> <operation name="listarTabelas"> <input message="tns:listarTabelasRequest"/> <output message="tns:listarTabelasResponse"/> </operation> </portType> <binding name="consultarTabelaBinding" type="tns:consultarTabelaPortType"> <soap:binding style="rpc" transport="http://schemas.xmlsoap.org/soap/http"/> <operation name="listarTabelas"> <soap:operation soapAction="eproc/listarTabelas"/> <input> <soap:body encodingStyle="http://schemas.xmlsoap.org/soap/encoding/" namespace="eproc" use="literal"/> </input> <output> <soap:body encodingStyle="http://schemas.xmlsoap.org/soap/encoding/" namespace="eproc" use="literal"/> </output> </operation> <operation name="consultarDados"> <soap:operation soapAction="eproc/consultarDados"/> <input> <soap:body encodingStyle="http://schemas.xmlsoap.org/soap/encoding/" namespace="eproc" use="literal"/> </input> <output> <soap:body encodingStyle="http://schemas.xmlsoap.org/soap/encoding/" namespace="eproc" use="literal"/> </output> </operation> <operation name="listarEstrutura"> <soap:operation soapAction="eproc/listarEstrutura"/> <input> <soap:body encodingStyle="http://schemas.xmlsoap.org/soap/encoding/" namespace="eproc" use="literal"/> </input> <output> <soap:body encodingStyle="http://schemas.xmlsoap.org/soap/encoding/" namespace="eproc" use="literal"/> </output> </operation> </binding> <wsdl:service name="consultarTabelaService"> <wsdl:port name="consultarTabelaPortType" binding="tns:consultarTabelaBinding"> <soap:address location="https://eproc2g-ws.trf6.jus.br/eproc/ws/controlador_ws.php?srv=consultarTabela"/> </wsdl:port> </wsdl:service> </definitions>
